blocks.title: Compare and Contrast

panels.label: What it is
panels.body: GraphBERT is a glossary node in the AI/ML learning graph.

panels.label: What it is not
panels.body: It is not just GraphBERT-Large and GraphBERT-Base; the graph shows how it sits inside the nearby graph.

panels.label: Common confusion
panels.body: Ask how it differs from nearby concepts and what changes when the term is applied. Compare it against GraphBERT-Large and GraphBERT-Base so the boundary stays visible instead of collapsing into a synonym pile.
